description: The --raw flag is undocumented/internal but doesn't follow the --x- naming convention established by --x-render-as. Remove --raw and replace with --x-raw for consistency. Audit other internal/debug flags (e.g. --dry-run if it's internal) and rename to --x- prefix. Update docs/design-output.md reference to --raw. Update any tests that use --raw.
title: Replace --raw with --x-raw and adopt --x- prefix for internal flags
